# HO3D Eval Origin

Vendored from `https://github.com/shreyashampali/ho3d`.

Upstream commit:

```text
2fd6ee17dc1383d0b3922bc10595a67058fca776
```

Files kept here are the minimal local-evaluation path used by ropetrack:

- `eval.py`
- `pred.py`
- `utils/fh_utils.py`
- `utils/eval_util.py`

This is intentionally not a submodule because the evaluator may be folded into
the ropetrack scripts later.
